memory:memory/2026-05-26-SQL-01-audit.md.snippet: - **Implementation:** SQLite FTS5 virtual table - **Test query:** `SELECT * FROM chunks_fts WHERE chunks_fts MATCH 'bootstrap'` - **Result:** Returns relevant chunks from MEMORY.md and chat transcripts ### Vector Embeddings - **Status:** ❌ NOT active - **Model:** `fts-only` (placeholder) - **Embedding length:** 2 bytes (empty placeholder) - **Conclusion:** OpenClaw is using text-only search, no semantic embeddings ## Findings **What's indexed:** - ✅ MEMORY.md - ✅ memory/*.md files (daily logs, reports) - ✅ memory/slack-exports/testing-env/*.md (chat transcripts) **What's NOT indexed:** - ❌ Session transcripts (from OpenClaw agent runs) - ❌ Bootstrap context files (SOUL.md, AGENTS.md, HAN
